title: roettlera obtusa
intro: Roettlera obtusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the 'Australian Rutaceae' or 'Yellow-berried Rutaceae'. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Roettlera obtusa include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in relieving pain and reducing inflammation. Roettlera obtusa is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine.
